/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/rw_buffer_sequence-t.dir/rw_buffer_sequence-t.cc.o -o ../../../runtime_output_directory/rw_buffer_sequence-t  ../../../libbinlogstandalone/lib/libbinlogstandalone.a ../libgunit_small.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a ../../../libgmock.a ../../../libgtest.a
